sglang.title: Fix prefill OOM due to wrong token calculation when page > 1
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes #7353, as when updating the prefill budget, we do not align the extend_input_len to the page size, which can happen in chunked prefill and ignore eos mode.

sglang.title: Support weight loading without mmap
sglang.author: guoyuhong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In certain environments (particularly network mounts and distributed storage systems), loading weights via mmap from safetensors can exhibit severe performance degradation. This issue has been previously identified and addressed in related projects (see huggingface/diffusers#10305).

In

sglang.title: Perormance: Enable cuda graph for dp idle batch
sglang.author: u4lr451
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, #6081 does not enable CUDA graphs when some DP ranks are idle input.
The goal of this pull request is to support CUDA graph execution even when some DP ranks are idle, thereby improving performance.
Modifications

sglang.title: bugfix: Prevent global mutation of conv.stop_str across requests
sglang.author: huangtingwei9988
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
conv.stop is global,  with code,  conv.stop is affected by every request stop_str
# conv.stop: ["a"]
# req1 : {"stop" :["b"]}
conv.stop = ['a']
stop = conv.stop # 'a'
stop.append('b')  # conv.stop becomes ['a', 'b']

# after req1, for req2
stop = conv.stop # ['a', 'b'], but 'b' is  only r

sglang.author: pyc96
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications

vllm.title: [EP+DP] Optimize the little operations in the DeepGEMM + DeepEP low latency case
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Optimizations when using DeepGEMM + DeepEP (for the decode worker in a P/D setup). On current main, the majority of time is spent in quantize ops, silu-and-mul, and copy operations to put the scales in the layout needed for DeepGEMM.
This PR has two pieces:

Set use_fp8_dispatch to True in D

vllm.author: cascade812
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add support sequence parallelism for static fp8 quantization in this PR.
It requires below config to enable it
config = CompilationConfig(level=3,
                           splitting_ops=[],
                           compile_sizes=[4],
                           custom_ops=["+rms_norm"])
